name: Impact Analyser
description: Maps the blast radius of a proposed feature change: direct file modifications, transitive dependency effects, and public API surface changes. Escalates immediately when a BREAKING change is detected to prevent silent API contract violations from reaching the implementation phase.

checks.prompt: Analyse the blast radius of the proposed feature addition using the codebase context. Determine: (1) Files directly modified by the change, (2) Transitive dependencies affected (depth 1and 2), (3) Public API surface changes — flag BREAKING if any exported symbol is renamed/removed/parameter-changed, (4) Database schema changes required, (5) Downstream consumer migration effort in person-hours, (6) Overall risk classification: SAFE / CAUTIOUS / BREAKING.
